_comment_rev2_cross_cutting: Cross-cutting rules from design Section 10a: expiry-day exclusion, gap-day cross-detector exclusion, universe-wide circuit-band exclusion. Implemented in services/universe_filter.py helpers; detectors call them as first-condition prerequisite.
_comment_setups: Wide-open OCI capture. Active capture for sub-project #9: gap_fade_short (TRUSTED baseline) + expiry_pin_strike_reversal (DEFERRED, capture-ready post option-chain fix d50b28f) + circuit_t1_fade_short (NEW sub-9 setup needing gauntlet/cell selection) + options_vol_iv_rank_revert (NEW sub-9 round-4 setup; SHORT-only, iv_rank>=0.85 cell, F&O 200, 11:00 entry; needs IV-rank parquet uploaded to options_iv/ bucket prefix). All four captured in one wide-open run so trades cross-analyze without confounding from separate captures. (Historical sub-7/sub-8 detectors that were retired post-Phase-1: mis_unwind_short, closing_hour_reversal, orb_15, pdh_pdl_reject, pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim, gap_and_go_continuation, ema5_alert_pullback, camarilla_l3_reversal, cpr_mean_revert, narrow_cpr_breakout, vwap_first_pullback — most source files DELETED in commit cycle ending 2026-05-01.)

expiry_pin_strike_reversal._retired_2026_05_14: Disabled in OCI override too — base config says enabled=False with _status_2026_05_12_RETIRED note. Override was leaking 2 fires/2yr (both losers, NET -Rs.6,130 MIS). Signal logic never sanity-validated. Keep disabled until someone runs the validation pass.

options_vol_iv_rank_revert._retired_2026_05_07: Round-4 candidate retired at Holdout (2025-10..2026-03). NET PF 1.436 passed but n=11 < 30-floor and WR delta +13.6pp > 10pp limit. See setups.options_vol_iv_rank_revert._status_2026_05_07_RETIRED in configuration.json. Override stays disabled to keep future OCI captures clean.
